hero.subtitle: {{brandName}} gives you live market context, AI execution strategies, and institutional custody — in one professional platform.
hero.chartAlt: Live portfolio analytics on a professional trading workstation
hero.videoAlt: Product walkthrough of the trading platform interface

markets.title: Markets, everywhere
markets.subtitle: Indices, stocks, crypto, futures, and forex — quotes and trends in one place.
markets.seeAllVolume: See all most actively traded stocks
markets.seeAllGainers: See all stocks with largest daily growth
markets.seeAllLosers: See all stocks with largest daily drop

product.title: Built for serious market work
product.subtitle: From AI strategies to live execution and curated signals — every tool stays in one Velion workspace.
product.aiDesc: Allocate capital to Velion Core, Momentum, or Alpha. Watch live profit accrue and run optional quick trades when you want more.
product.roomDesc: Place orders with a professional chart layout, positions panel, and account context designed for focused sessions.
product.signalsDesc: Follow researched bias calls with clear Long / Short framing — then act from your dashboard when ready.

insights.title: Market insights from the desk
insights.subtitle: Curated trade ideas styled for quick scanning — symbol, bias, and a short thesis.

communityPulse.title: Where the world does markets
communityPulse.subtitle: Join traders and investors researching charts, sharing ideas, and acting on live market context — all in one Velion workspace.
communityPulse.trendsSub: Symbols the desk and community are watching right now.
communityPulse.storiesSub: Headlines that move FX and cross-asset risk.

marketingTrust.pillarsSub: Clear custody, strong security, transparent reporting, and a desk that answers when markets move.
marketingTrust.pillarCustodyDesc: Client funds are held separately from operating capital, with documented custody procedures.
marketingTrust.pillarSecurityDesc: TLS 1.3 in transit, AES-256 at rest, and continuous monitoring across critical systems.
marketingTrust.pillarTransparencyDesc: Statements, trade history, and certificate verification so you can audit what matters.
marketingTrust.pillarSupportDesc: Human support for deposits, withdrawals, and account questions — not just chatbots.

editorial.title: The discipline of institutional finance, delivered digitally
editorial.body: Our team combines decades of experience across asset management, compliance, and market infrastructure. Every client receives the custody standards we apply to institutional mandates.
editorial.teamAlt: Senior advisors reviewing portfolio strategy in a modern boardroom

services.title: Complete Wealth Infrastructure
services.subtitle: Every service engineered for security, transparency, and institutional-grade outcomes.
services.hedgeFundsDesc: Institutional alternative strategies with documented risk-adjusted returns.
services.copyTradingDesc: Mirror verified professionals with transparent performance history.
services.cryptoMiningDesc: Enterprise-grade mining with real-time monitoring and daily distributions.
services.forexDesc: Global currency markets with competitive spreads and fast execution.
services.stocksDesc: Equities across major exchanges with research-backed insights.
services.signalsDesc: Professional market signals with documented accuracy rates.
services.pageSubtitle: Charts, strategies, and execution tools — built for traders and investors who want a professional workspace.
services.productsSub: Everything you need to research, decide, and trade — in one account.
services.aiTradingDesc: Allocate capital to Velion strategies and watch live profit accrue automatically.
services.tradingRoomDesc: Professional chart workspace with live quotes, order tickets, and positions.
services.whySub: We combine research, execution, and custody in one account — so you spend less time switching tools and more time making decisions.
services.why1Desc: Markets, charts, AI strategies, signals, and withdrawals live in a single client portal.
services.why2Desc: Segregated custody, KYC/AML checks, and manual review on sensitive fund movements.
services.why3Desc: Every product page explains how funding, risk controls, and reporting work before you commit capital.
services.howSub: A short path from registration to funded trading — with compliance built in.
services.how1Desc: Register with email, set credentials, and access the client dashboard.
services.how2Desc: Complete KYC so higher limits and full product access can be unlocked.
services.how3Desc: Deposit via supported crypto or gift-card rails. Finance verifies before credit.
services.how4Desc: Use the trading room, AI bots, or signals — with balances and history always visible.
services.faq1a: Yes. Client capital is held in segregated arrangements, apart from company operating reserves, under documented custody procedures.
services.faq2a: Not necessarily. AI Trading and copy tools are designed for guided allocation, while the trading room remains available for active traders.
services.faq3a: Requests are reviewed manually for security. Crypto is typically faster; bank and wire rails follow published processing windows after approval.
services.ctaSub: Open a free account, complete verification, and explore the full product suite.

howItWorks.title: Four Steps to Secure Wealth
howItWorks.subtitle: Onboarding designed for speed without compromising compliance.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Register securely in under two minutes with email verification.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Complete KYC with bank-grade document verification.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Deposit via bank transfer or supported digital assets.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Access our full suite of wealth and trading tools.
howItWorks.laptopAlt: Client reviewing investment portfolio on a laptop

testimonials.title: Trusted by Investors Worldwide
testimonials.subtitle: Verified clients across private wealth, trading desks, and family offices in the United States.
testimonials.t1: {{brandName}} transformed how I manage my portfolio. The transparency exceeded my expectations.
testimonials.t2: Institutional reporting and segregated custody give me confidence to recommend {{shortName}}.
testimonials.t3: Copy trading on {{shortName}} delivers clear metrics and reliable execution every time.
testimonials.t4: Their compliance desk responds within hours. That level of service is rare in digital wealth.
testimonials.t5: Execution quality and reporting are on par with tier-one brokers I've used for fifteen years.
testimonials.t6: Clients appreciate the clarity of statements and the ability to verify certificates independently.

security.title: Bank-Grade Protection
security.subtitle: {{brandName}} operates under recognised frameworks with documented compliance procedures.
security.encryptionDesc: TLS 1.3 and AES-256 protect every transaction and stored record.
security.segregatedDesc: Client capital held in ring-fenced accounts, separate from operating reserves.
security.surveillanceDesc: Real-time fraud analytics and 24/7 security operations oversight.
security.kycDesc: Identity verification aligned with FATF international standards.
security.pageSubtitle: How we protect your assets and data.
security.dataEncryptionDesc: TLS 1.3 in transit. AES-256 at rest.
security.infrastructureDesc: Enterprise cloud with DDoS protection and redundant failover.

faq.title: Common Questions
faq.q1: How do I open an account with {{brandName}}?
faq.a1: Click 'Open Account', register with your email, complete KYC verification, and fund your account. The process typically takes 24-48 hours.
faq.q2: Are my funds safe and segregated?
faq.a2: Yes. Client funds are held in segregated accounts, completely separate from our operating reserves, with strict custody procedures.
faq.a3: Minimum requirements vary by service. Contact our client desk after registration for current thresholds and eligibility.
faq.a4: Withdrawal requests are processed within 1-3 business days after approval. Crypto withdrawals are typically faster.
faq.a5: Yes. Registered clients can mirror verified professional traders with transparent performance history.

auth.emailOnlyNote: Sign in with your email — no social accounts required.
auth.panelSubtitle: Access global markets, managed portfolios, and bespoke advisory — all from one secure platform trusted by clients worldwide.
auth.signInDesc: Sign in to manage your portfolio and trade global markets.
auth.sessionExpired: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
auth.welcomeDesc: Access your client portal or create a new account.
auth.regionRequired: Please enter your state or region.
auth.accountCurrencyHint: Balances and product pricing use this currency. You can change it later in Settings — your balance will be converted at mid-market rates.
auth.signUpLocationHint: Tell us where you’re based — required for account compliance.
auth.signInFailed: Sign in failed. Check your email and password.
auth.signUpFailed: Could not create your account. Please try again.
auth.checkEmail: Check your email to confirm your account, then sign in.

dashboard.title: Client Dashboard
dashboard.portfolioOverview: Here's an overview of your portfolio.
dashboard.loadError: We couldn’t load your portfolio. Please try again.
dashboard.profileLoadErrorDesc: Your session is active, but we couldn’t fetch your account details. Retry or sign out and try again.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.emptyUnread: You’re all caught up — no unread alerts.
notifications.pageSubtitle: Alerts for deposits, withdrawals, trades, verification, and support.
notifications.pushHint: Enabled by default. Get alerts for deposits, withdrawals, trades, and more.
notifications.pushBlocked: Blocked in browser settings — allow notifications for this site.
notifications.enableDesc: Get instant alerts for deposits, withdrawals, trades, and account updates.

settingsPage.title: Settings
settingsPage.subtitle: Manage your profile, wallet, security, and preferences.
settingsPage.profileDesc: Update your photo and personal details visible on your account.
settingsPage.avatarHint: Click your photo to upload a new profile picture (JPG, PNG, max 5MB).
settingsPage.bioPlaceholder: Tell us a little about yourself…
settingsPage.walletDesc: Link a crypto wallet for faster withdrawals and on-chain identity.
settingsPage.walletBrowserHint: Works with MetaMask, Trust Wallet, and other Web3 extensions.
settingsPage.walletNotFound: No Web3 wallet detected. Install MetaMask or enter your address manually.
settingsPage.walletConnectFailed: Could not connect wallet. Try again or enter your address manually.
settingsPage.securityDesc: Change your password and manage account protection.
settingsPage.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
settingsPage.identityDesc: Verify your identity to unlock higher limits and full platform access.
settingsPage.notificationsDesc: Choose how you want to be notified about account activity.
settingsPage.pushNotificationsDesc: Instant alerts for deposits, withdrawals, trades, KYC updates, and support replies.
settingsPage.pushUnsupported: Push notifications are not supported in this browser. Try Chrome or Safari on a secure connection.
settingsPage.pushBlockedHelp: Open your browser site settings, allow Notifications for this site, then return here and turn them on.
settingsPage.notificationSoundDesc: Play a short chime when a new notification arrives while you are on the site.
settingsPage.notifInboxHint: You can also review past alerts anytime from your notification center.
settingsPage.currencyDesc: Switching currency converts your wallet balance, subscriptions, trades, and history using reference FX rates. Search from 170+ world currencies.
settingsPage.themeDesc: Switch between dark and light mode across the site.
settingsPage.saveFailed: Something went wrong. Please try again.

deposits.title: Deposit Funds
deposits.subtitle: Secure, manually verified deposits
deposits.cryptoDesc: Deposit BTC, ETH, USDT, BNB, SOL, XRP, LTC, DOGE and more
deposits.giftCardDesc: Redeem Apple, Amazon, Steam, Google Play, Visa and more
deposits.verificationNote: All deposits are manually verified by our finance team for security. You will receive a notification as soon as your funds are credited.
deposits.buyCryptoDesc: If you don't own cryptocurrency, purchase it from one of our trusted partner sites first. Once you have crypto, return here and use the Cryptocurrency deposit option above.
deposits.buyCryptoStep: Step 1: Buy on a partner site → Step 2: Deposit crypto to {{brandName}}
deposits.buyCryptoFooter: Partner sites open in a new tab. {{brandName}} is not responsible for third-party purchases — always verify the vendor before paying.
deposits.giftCardsTitle: Don't have a gift card yet?
deposits.giftCardsDesc: Purchase a digital gift card from a verified retailer below, then come back and redeem it using the Gift Card deposit option above.
deposits.giftCardsStep: Step 1: Buy a gift card online → Step 2: Redeem it on {{brandName}}
deposits.giftCardsFooter: Only buy gift cards from reputable sellers. After purchase, submit your card details on {{brandName}} for verification.
deposits.partnerMoonPayDesc: Buy Bitcoin, Ethereum, USDT and more with credit card, debit card, or bank transfer.
deposits.partnerTransakDesc: Global on-ramp supporting 170+ cryptocurrencies and local payment methods worldwide.
deposits.partnerRaiseDesc: Discounted digital gift cards for Apple, Amazon, Visa, Steam and hundreds of brands.
deposits.partnerGyftDesc: Instant digital gift cards delivered by email — Apple, Amazon, Google Play and more.
deposits.cryptoPageDesc: Select a coin, send funds to your wallet address, then submit your deposit for verification.
deposits.giftCardPageDesc: Select a provider and submit your gift card details for manual verification.
deposits.submitError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
deposits.invalidAmount: Enter a valid deposit amount greater than zero.
deposits.walletUnavailable: Deposit address is not available yet. Please try again later.
deposits.submitSuccess: Deposit request submitted. Our team will verify and credit your account shortly.

trading.title: Live Trading
trading.subtitle: Trade crypto with real-time charts and one-click orders
trading.subtitleSimple: Pick a market, choose an amount, then Buy or Sell. That’s it.
trading.subtitleDesk: Spot desk with live Binance prices, chart, and instant market fills.
trading.stepAmount: Enter how much USD to trade
trading.stepBuySell: Tap Buy or Sell and confirm
trading.orderHint: Enter an amount in USD. We’ll show what you get at the live price.
trading.needBalance: Add funds to your account before you can trade.
trading.needHoldings: You don’t hold {{asset}} yet. Buy first, then sell from your inventory.
trading.simpleFlow: Orders execute at the current live price. Open trades show below.
trading.fillsHint: Market orders fill instantly at the live mark price. Buys spend cash; sells reduce your holdings.
trading.noOpenPositions: No open trades yet. Place a Buy or Sell above to get started.
trading.noHoldings: No holdings yet. Buy at market to open a spot position.
trading.orderPlacedBuy: Buy order submitted for {{pair}} ({{amount}}). It’s pending confirmation.
trading.orderPlacedSell: Sell order submitted for {{pair}} ({{amount}}). It’s pending confirmation.
trading.insufficientBalance: That amount is higher than your available cash.
trading.insufficientHoldings: You don’t have enough of this asset to sell.
trading.priceUnavailable: Live price unavailable — try again in a moment.
trading.profitSubtitle: Realized profit credited to your balance, plus open holdings P&L.
trading.realizedProfitHint: Profit added from your completed trades (paid to cash).
trading.totalPnlHint: Realized profit plus unrealized holdings P&L.
trading.noProfitYet: No profit credited yet. Filled trades appear here when profit is added.

copyTrading.title: Copy Trading
copyTrading.subtitle: Allocate capital to a published strategy. Past sample ranges are illustrative — markets can move against you.
copyTrading.confirmBody: You are allocating {{amount}} to {{name}}. Funds leave your available balance immediately. You can review this under Active allocations.
copyTrading.subscribed: Allocation recorded. Your subscription is now active.
copyTrading.alreadyActive: You already have an active allocation with this strategy.
copyTrading.sampleHint: Not a guarantee of future results
copyTrading.howItWorksBody: Allocate capital to a strategy desk. Executions are reviewed by operations. Returns are never guaranteed and depend on live market conditions.
copyTrading.riskBody: You can lose part or all of an allocation. Only use funds you can afford to commit.

mining.title: Cloud Mining
mining.subtitle: Reserve hashrate capacity with fixed-term contracts. Daily yield accrues to your balance on a rolling schedule — figures shown are indicative targets, not guarantees.
mining.confirmBody: {{amount}} will be reserved for {{name}}. Hashrate is provisioned by operations; indicative daily targets are not guaranteed.
mining.purchased: {{name}} reserved. Daily accruals will credit to your balance on the next sync cycle.
mining.howItWorksBody: Capital is allocated at purchase. Your contract accrues daily yield based on the reserved hashrate and term. Accruals sync to your wallet balance automatically — similar to how institutional mining pools distribute rewards on a schedule.
mining.riskBody: Mining yields vary with network difficulty, fees, and uptime. Treat any daily percentage as an estimate, not a fixed return.

signals.title: Trading Signals
signals.subtitle: Institutional-style signal desk with entry, target, and stop levels. Subscribe to unlock tier-gated setups — research only, not financial advice.
signals.confirmBody: {{amount}} will be charged for {{name}} ({{days}} days). Desk access unlocks immediately.
signals.subscribed: Subscribed to {{name}}. Your signal desk is now live.
signals.lockedBody: Subscribe to a plan to access the live desk feed with entry, target, stop, and risk-reward ratios — the same format used by professional trading desks.
signals.howItWorksBody: Each setup includes defined entry, target, and stop levels with a confidence score and risk-reward ratio — the standard format used by institutional research desks. Confirm levels in the Trading Room before acting.
signals.riskBody: Signals can be wrong. Size positions carefully and never trade money you cannot afford to lose.
signals.accessBody: You have an active plan. Open Notifications for the latest desk notes, or go to the Trading Room to act.

support.title: Support
support.subtitle: Message our team anytime — we reply in real time.
support.emptyDesc: Start a chat with Velion support. Ask about deposits, withdrawals, trading, or your account.
support.startHint: Tell us briefly what you need help with.
support.subject: Subject
support.firstMessagePlaceholder: Describe your question in a few sentences…
support.dropHint: Drag & drop images, PDFs, or documents here

kyc.subtitle: Secure identity checks protect your account and unlock full trading access.
kyc.introDesc: Upload a government ID and complete a live face check so we can protect your funds and unlock deposits, withdrawals, and trading.
kyc.submitted: Verification complete. Your identity is approved and full account access is unlocked.
kyc.approvedDesc: Your identity is verified. Deposits, withdrawals, and trading are fully unlocked.
kyc.pendingDesc: Your documents are with our compliance team. This usually takes 24–48 hours — we’ll notify you when it’s done.
kyc.rejectedDesc: We couldn’t approve your previous submission. Please upload a clearer document, retake your selfie, and try again.
kyc.rejectedBanner: Your last submission was rejected. Upload a clear ID and complete a new face verification below.
kyc.documentTypeHint: Use a government-issued ID that shows your full name and photo.
kyc.uploadHint: JPEG, PNG, WebP, or PDF — max 10 MB.
kyc.uploadFormats: Front of your ID, well lit, all corners visible.
kyc.errorFileType: Please upload a JPEG, PNG, WebP, or PDF file.
kyc.errorFileSize: File is too large. Maximum size is 10 MB.
kyc.errorNoFile: Please select a document before submitting.
kyc.errorNoFace: Please complete face verification before submitting.
kyc.dropHint: Drag & drop your ID here, or tap to browse
kyc.reviewDesc: Double-check your ID and selfie. Our compliance team usually finishes within 24–48 hours.
kyc.pendingEta: Verification is approved as soon as you submit
kyc.docIdHint: Front of your national ID card
kyc.faceDesc: Take a live selfie so we can match your face to your ID — the same process used by banks and major brokers.
kyc.faceStartDesc: We use your camera for a guided capture. Keep your face inside the oval, then hold still.
kyc.faceCenterPrompt: Center your face in the oval
kyc.faceReadyPrompt: Face detected — hold still, then capture
kyc.faceCameraDenied: Camera permission is blocked for this site. Click the lock icon in your browser address bar → Site settings → Camera → Allow, then retry.
kyc.faceCameraError: Could not start the camera. Check permissions and try again.
kyc.faceCameraInsecure: Camera only works on a secure HTTPS connection. Open the site on HTTPS and try again.
kyc.faceCameraUnsupported: This browser cannot access the camera. Try Chrome or Safari, or upload a selfie instead.
kyc.faceCameraMissing: No camera was found on this device. Connect a webcam or upload a selfie instead.
kyc.faceCameraBusy: The camera is already in use by another app. Close it and try again.
kyc.faceCameraBlocked: This page is not allowed to use the camera. Refresh after the update and try again.
kyc.faceCameraHelp: Tip: Use HTTPS, allow Camera for this site, then tap Retry. If it still fails, upload a clear selfie photo.
kyc.faceUploadType: Please upload a JPEG, PNG, or WebP selfie.
kyc.faceCaptureFailed: Could not capture your selfie. Please try again.
kyc.faceTipLighting: Use even lighting — avoid strong backlight.
kyc.faceTipGlasses: Remove sunglasses and hats for a clear face match.
kyc.faceTipMatch: Your selfie should look like the photo on your ID.
kyc.trustFaceDesc: A real-time selfie helps confirm you are the person on the ID and reduces account fraud.
kyc.unlockWithdrawals: Withdraw to your bank or wallet
kyc.unlockTrading: Trade and use all platform products
kyc.trustEncryptedDesc: Files are stored in a restricted account folder. Only you and authorized compliance staff can access them.
kyc.trustComplianceDesc: KYC helps {{brand}} meet AML requirements and keep accounts safe from fraud.
kyc.trustReviewDesc: A compliance analyst reviews each submission — typically within 24–48 hours.
kyc.tipClear: Use a sharp, well-lit photo — avoid glare and blur.
kyc.tipCorners: Show all four corners of the document.
kyc.tipReadable: Make sure your name, photo, and ID number are readable.
kyc.tipMatch: The name on the ID should match your account profile.
kyc.pendingCardTitle: We’re reviewing your ID and face check
kyc.pendingCardDesc: No further action is needed right now. You’ll get a notification when a decision is made.
kyc.pendingPoint1: Keep notifications enabled so you don’t miss the decision.
kyc.pendingPoint2: You can still browse markets and explore the dashboard.
kyc.pendingPoint3: Deposits, withdrawals, and trading unlock after approval.
kyc.approvedSupport: Need help with your verified account? Contact {{brand}} support anytime.
kyc.required: Please verify your identity before making any transactions.
kyc.gateDesc: For your security and compliance, deposits, withdrawals, and trading are available after KYC approval.
kyc.gatePendingDesc: Your documents are being reviewed. You can transact once your account is approved.
kyc.gateRejectedDesc: Your previous submission was rejected. Please resubmit your documents to unlock transactions.

transactions.title: Transactions
transactions.subtitle: Your full deposit, withdrawal, and trade history in one place.

receipt.title: Transaction receipt
receipt.footer: This is your official transaction record on VELION MARKETS.
receipt.viewHint: Tap a transaction to view receipt

tradesPage.title: Trade History
tradesPage.subtitle: Manual Trading Room orders and AI bot fills in one place.

withdrawals.title: Withdrawals
withdrawals.subtitle: Request a payout to your bank, wallet, or e-wallet. Requests are reviewed before funds leave your account.
withdrawals.cryptoDesc: Send BTC, ETH, USDT and other supported coins to an external wallet.
withdrawals.bankDesc: Domestic ACH or local bank transfer to an account in your name.
withdrawals.wireDesc: International SWIFT wire to a bank account worldwide.
withdrawals.ewalletDesc: PayPal, Wise, Skrill, Neteller, Revolut and similar providers.
withdrawals.securityNote: Double-check destination details before confirming. Incorrect addresses or account numbers can delay or prevent payout.
withdrawals.processingNote: Typical timing after approval: crypto 1–24 hours · bank 1–3 business days · wire 3–5 business days · e-wallet 1–2 business days.
withdrawals.chooseMethodHint: Pick one method. You will enter destination details on the next screen.
withdrawals.balanceHint: Available cash you can request to withdraw. Pending requests hold funds until approved or rejected.
withdrawals.howItWorksBody: Submit a request with your destination details. Our team reviews it, then releases funds to that destination. You can track status under Recent withdrawals.
withdrawals.reviewBody: Withdrawals are not instant. Funds leave your balance when the request is submitted and stay on hold until the request is approved or rejected.
withdrawals.cryptoTrustBody: Use a wallet address that supports the selected coin and network. We cannot recover funds sent to the wrong address.
withdrawals.bankTrustBody: The account holder name should match your verified identity. Mismatched details may delay approval.
withdrawals.wireTrustBody: SWIFT wires take longer and may involve intermediary banks. Confirm IBAN and SWIFT carefully.
withdrawals.ewalletTrustBody: Use the email registered with your e-wallet provider. Unsupported accounts may be returned.
withdrawals.walletHint: Paste carefully — crypto transfers are irreversible once sent.
withdrawals.confirmHint: Your available balance will be reduced immediately. Processing starts after manual review.
withdrawals.cryptoQuickDesc: Send funds directly to your external wallet. Select a coin to start your withdrawal.
withdrawals.bankWireDesc: Receive funds via domestic ACH or international SWIFT wire to your bank account.
withdrawals.ewalletQuickDesc: Withdraw to PayPal, Wise, Skrill, Neteller, Revolut and other supported providers.
withdrawals.cryptoPageDesc: Select a coin and enter the external wallet that should receive the payout.
withdrawals.bankPageDesc: Enter domestic bank details for an ACH or local transfer in your name.
withdrawals.wirePageDesc: Enter international bank details for a SWIFT wire transfer.
withdrawals.ewalletPageDesc: Select your e-wallet provider and the account email linked to it.
withdrawals.wireProcessing: International wires typically take 3–5 business days after approval.
withdrawals.ewalletProcessing: E-wallet transfers typically process within 1–2 business days after approval.
withdrawals.submitSuccess: Withdrawal request submitted. It will stay pending until our team reviews it.
withdrawals.insufficientBalance: That amount is higher than your available balance.
withdrawals.noHistory: When you submit a request, it will show here with its review status.
withdrawals.feesRequiredDesc: Your account has outstanding fees. Pay them from your balance to unlock withdrawals.
withdrawals.feePayFailed: Could not pay this fee. Check your balance and try again.
withdrawals.feesNeedDeposit: Your balance is too low to cover these fees. Deposit funds first.
withdrawals.feesPayHint: Paying fees deducts the amount from your available balance.

aiTrading.title: AI Trading
aiTrading.titleSimple: Let a robot trade for you
aiTrading.subtitle: Choose an AI bot, set how long it runs and how much power to invest. Your bot earns guaranteed hourly profits — the more power you put in, the more you make. After purchase, trade crypto directly through your active bot.
aiTrading.subtitleSimple: Pick a bot. Choose how much. Tap Start. Then watch your money grow.
aiTrading.step1Desc: Each robot trades for you automatically. We recommend {{bot}} if this is your first time.
aiTrading.step2Title: 2. Choose how much and how long
aiTrading.step2Desc: Put in money, pick how long the robot should work, then tap Start.
aiTrading.howLongHint: The robot earns money every hour until the timer ends.
aiTrading.whichCoinHint: Usually Bitcoin is fine. You can change this if you want.
aiTrading.howMuchHint: Minimum {{min}}. This is what the robot uses.
aiTrading.couldEarnHint: {{bot}} earns about {{rate}}% every hour for {{hours}} hours.
aiTrading.profitDisclaimer: This is an estimate. Real results can be a little different.
aiTrading.whatHappensNext: After you start, the robot works by itself. When the timer ends, your money plus your earnings go back into your balance.
aiTrading.moneyBackNote: Your money comes back when the timer ends — plus everything you earned.
aiTrading.earnMoreDesc: Place supplementary orders using capital from your active session allocation. No additional wallet debit.
aiTrading.makeProfitDesc: Choose how big one extra trade should be. Each button uses part of your bot investment — you are not charged again from your wallet.
aiTrading.makeProfitExample: Example: if you invested {{amount}}, Small uses {{small}}, Medium uses {{medium}}, Big uses {{big}}.
aiTrading.historyDesc: Bots that finished, and what they earned.
aiTrading.selectBotHint: Select a strategy below, then configure run time and allocation.
aiTrading.purchaseDesc: Configure {{bot}} with your preferred run duration, crypto pair, and power level.
aiTrading.powerHint: Every dollar of power earns {{rate}}% per hour automatically while the bot runs.
aiTrading.estimatedBreakdown: Includes ~{{passive}} passive profit over {{hours}}h plus manual trades.
aiTrading.purchased: Your bot is running! Watch your earnings grow.
aiTrading.insufficientBalance: Not enough money. Add funds first.
aiTrading.noActiveBotsDesc: Start one in a few taps — it’s easy.
aiTrading.payoutNote: When time runs out, your investment + all profits are added to your balance automatically.
aiTrading.tradeSuccess: Order filled. +{{profit}} added to session P&L.
aiTrading.tradeExceedsPower: Order size exceeds your session allocation.
aiTrading.noHistory: Nothing here yet — finished bots will show up here.

flow.pickBot: Pick a bot ({{bot}} is great for beginners)
flow.setPlan: Choose how much money and how long
flow.watch: Tap Start, then watch earnings grow

steps.title: A robot can trade for you
steps.body: You don’t need to know about charts. The robot buys and sells crypto for you. You just start it and watch.
steps.tip: This short guide only takes a few seconds.

steps.title: Three easy taps
steps.body: Pick a bot, choose how much money to put in, then tap Start.
steps.tip: {{bot}} is the easiest choice for your first bot.

steps.title: Then just watch
steps.body: Your earnings grow while the timer runs. When time is up, your money plus earnings go back to your balance.
steps.tip: Ready? Tap the button below to start.

userDetail.title: User details
userDetail.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, email, role, location…
userDetail.withdrawalFeesDesc: Assign compliance or activation fees. Pending fees block withdrawals until the user pays from balance, or you mark them paid / waive them.
userDetail.adjustFundsDesc: Add or remove funds from this account. Every change requires a reason and is logged for audit.
userDetail.fundInvalidAmount: Enter a valid amount greater than zero.
userDetail.fundInsufficient: Cannot remove more than the user’s current balance.
userDetail.feeAssigned: Fee assigned. Withdrawals are blocked until it is paid.
userDetail.feeInvalidAmount: Enter a valid amount greater than zero
userDetail.locationPending: Location not detected yet. The user must open the dashboard while signed in — their IP and region will appear here automatically.
userDetail.passwordNote: Passwords are stored securely as hashes. Admins cannot view them — only send a reset link.
userDetail.accountActionsDesc: Suspend access, reset verification, or save an internal note. A reason is required for every action except lifting a suspension. Admin roles cannot be changed from the website.
userDetail.reasonPlaceholder: Explain why you are taking this action…

actionSuccess.reset_kyc: KYC reset. User must verify again.

userDetail.deleteUserDesc: Permanently removes this user, their balance, trades, and all related data. This cannot be undone. Enter a reason above, then confirm deletion.
userDetail.deleteConfirmHint: The user will lose access immediately. Deposits, withdrawals, and trade history will be removed.

admin.accountSuspendedDesc: Your access has been restricted by our compliance team.
admin.accountSuspendedHelp: Contact support if you believe this was a mistake.
admin.kycSubtitle: Compare ID documents with face selfies, then approve or reject submissions.
admin.kycCompareHint: Confirm the person in the selfie matches the photo on the ID.
admin.depositsSubtitle: Review deposit requests with full transaction details, images, and user info.
admin.imageLoadFailed: Could not load image. Try opening it in a new tab.
admin.noGiftCardImages: No card images were attached to this deposit.
admin.depositConfigSubtitle: Manage crypto wallet addresses and external buy-crypto / gift-card partner links shown to users.
admin.cryptoWalletsDesc: Wallet addresses users send crypto to when depositing on the platform.
admin.buyCryptoSitesDesc: External partner links shown on the deposits page for users who need to buy crypto first.
admin.buyGiftCardSitesDesc: External partner links for purchasing gift cards before redeeming on the platform.
admin.withdrawalsSubtitle: Review who is withdrawing, process payouts, and assign withdrawal charges from one place.
admin.withdrawalAssignFeeDesc: Add a fee for {{name}}. Pending fees block further withdrawals until paid or waived.
admin.tradesSubtitle: Monitor client fills and credit trading profit to their balance.
admin.profitHint: Credits the user’s cash balance and records profit on this trade. They will see it on Live Trading.
admin.profitAmountInvalid: Enter a profit amount greater than zero.
admin.subject: Subject
admin.emailClientOpened: Email client opened. Configure SMTP integration for automated sending.

about.whoWeAreP1: {{brandName}} is a regulated digital asset management firm providing managed portfolios, mirror allocation, and discretionary mandates to private and institutional investors.
about.whoWeAreP2: Our operating framework combines accredited portfolio management, independent risk oversight, and audited reporting infrastructure — delivering professional wealth services with the transparency expected of an institutional counterparty.
about.securityDesc: Operating under recognised regulatory frameworks with KYC/AML, AES-256 encryption, and segregated custody.
about.globalDesc: Trusted by verified clients across 150 jurisdictions, from private investors to institutions.
about.performanceDesc: Independently reviewed reporting with transparent fee disclosure and on-demand statements.
about.deskDesc: Accredited specialists with documented service-level commitments.
about.complianceKyc: KYC & AML aligned with FATF standards
about.hedgeFundsPageDesc: Diversified alternative investment strategies managed by accredited portfolio managers.
about.cryptoMiningPageDesc: Institutional-grade mining with real-time hashrate monitoring.
about.forexPageDesc: Global currency markets with competitive spreads.
about.stocksPageDesc: Equities across major exchanges with research insights.

pages.aboutSubtitle: A regulated wealth management platform built on institutional governance, transparent reporting, and verified custody.
pages.reviewsSubtitle: Follow community trends, desk ideas, and reviews from investors building on Velion — with clear rules and verified context.
pages.communityLiveSubtitle: Live headlines from Cointelegraph, Decrypt, BBC Business, CNBC, and Yahoo Finance — plus trending coins from CoinGecko. Research first, then trade.
pages.ideasSubtitle: Live market ideas and analysis from trusted publishers — crypto, finance, and markets. Open any card to read the full story on the source.
pages.ideasDisclaimer: Ideas are publisher content for research only — not personalised investment advice. Always verify on the original site.
pages.ideasCtaTitle: Trade the idea in your room
pages.ideasCtaSub: Jump to live charts after you finish reading.
pages.communityTrendsLiveSub: Live search trends from CoinGecko — refreshed with the feed.
pages.communityEmpty: No stories available right now. Try refreshing in a moment.
pages.communityError: We could not load live news. Check your connection and try again.
pages.communityFeedSub: Dense, TradingView-style feed — open any headline on the publisher’s site.
pages.communitySourcesSub: Stories are fetched from public RSS feeds of established outlets. We do not rewrite headlines — click through to read the full article on the original site.
pages.communityDisclaimer: News is for information only and is not investment advice. Always verify details on the publisher’s website before acting.
pages.communityCtaTitle: Ready to act on the news?
pages.communityCtaSub: Create an account to follow ideas, unlock signals, and leave verified feedback after you trade.
pages.communityCtaLiveSub: Open the trading room with live charts after you finish reading.
pages.communityIdeasSub: Curated trade ideas with clear bias and short thesis — TradingView-style.
pages.communityReviewsSub: What clients say about custody, execution, and support.
pages.communityWhyTitle: A community built on research, not noise
pages.communityWhySub: We highlight ideas with structure — symbol, bias, and thesis — so members can evaluate setups instead of chasing hype.
pages.communityRule1Desc: Editors' picks include a clear bias and a short written thesis you can challenge.
pages.communityRule2Desc: House rules discourage spam, guaranteed-profit claims, and personal attacks.
pages.communityRule3Desc: Reviews come from real account holders discussing custody, execution, and support.
pages.communityG1: Share setups with context — timeframe, risk, and invalidation.
pages.communityG2: No guaranteed returns or pressure to deposit.
pages.communityG3: Keep discussions about markets, tools, and process — not personal data.
pages.communityG4: Report issues to support; never share passwords or wallet seeds.
pages.communityFaq1a: Yes. We publish member feedback about product experience and remove abusive or clearly fraudulent content.
pages.communityFaq2a: Editors' picks are curated by the desk. Registered clients can follow signals and markets from their dashboard.
pages.communityFaq3a: No. Ideas and reviews are educational and experiential. Always do your own research and manage risk.
pages.faqsSubtitle: Everything you need to know about our platform.
pages.payoutsSubtitle: Transparent record of client withdrawals processed through our platform.
pages.verifySubtitle: Enter a certificate ID to verify its authenticity.
pages.tradingRoomTitle: Trade with a professional chart workspace
pages.tradingRoomSubtitle: Live quotes, multi-timeframe charts, and order tools — designed for focused sessions, not cluttered dashboards.
pages.roomFeat1Desc: Crypto, FX, indices, and metals in one clean layout.
pages.roomFeat2Desc: See pairs, last price, and change without leaving the chart.
pages.roomFeat3Desc: Sign in to place orders from the live trading room.
pages.roomFeat4Desc: Dense, product-first UI inspired by serious charting platforms.
pages.roomReadyDesc: Sign in to access the live trading workspace with balances and positions.
pages.roomWorkflowTitle: A session that stays under control
pages.roomWorkflowSub: From watchlist to ticket to positions — every step stays visible so you know exposure before you size up.
pages.roomStep1Desc: Browse live pairs and indices with last price and change.
pages.roomStep2Desc: Switch timeframes and review structure before you commit.
pages.roomStep3Desc: Use order tickets with balance checks — insufficient funds are blocked.
pages.roomStep4Desc: Open and closed trades appear in your history for later review.
pages.roomDataTitle: Market data you can rely on
pages.roomDataSub: Quotes are streamed for active sessions. When connectivity drops, the room prompts a refresh instead of silently showing stale prices.
pages.roomRisk1: Size positions against available balance — never assume unlimited leverage.
pages.roomRisk2: Use stops and targets when your strategy requires them.
pages.roomRisk3: Review history after the session; process beats impulse.
pages.roomFaq1q: Do I need a funded account to view charts?
pages.roomFaq1a: You can explore the marketing preview freely. Live order placement requires a signed-in client account with available balance.
pages.roomFaq2a: The room focuses on liquid crypto majors with related FX and index context. Availability can expand as markets are enabled.
pages.roomFaq3a: Orders are validated against your balance and submitted through the platform engine. You receive confirmation and can track status in positions and history.
pages.holdingsSubtitle: Asset allocation across our managed portfolios.
pages.signalsSubtitle: Editors' picks, Long/Short bias, and active signal levels — researched for clarity, never sold as guarantees.
pages.signalsIdeasSub: Community-style idea cards with symbol, bias, and thesis.
pages.signalsActiveSub: Entry, target, and stop levels from the research desk.
pages.signalsUnlock: Unlock the full signal feed and trade from your dashboard.
pages.signalsMethodTitle: How the desk builds a signal
pages.signalsMethodSub: Every published level should be explainable. We prefer incomplete honesty over confident fiction.
pages.signalsM1Desc: Start with trend, volatility, and session risk before naming levels.
pages.signalsM2Desc: Entry, target, and stop are written so you can judge risk/reward yourself.
pages.signalsM3Desc: Long / Short / Neutral framing — invalidation is part of the idea.
pages.signalsM4Desc: Active vs closed status keeps the feed honest about what is still live.
pages.signalsDisclaimer: Signals and ideas are educational market commentary. They are not personalised investment advice. Markets can gap; past performance does not guarantee future results. Only risk capital you can afford to lose.
pages.signalsFaq1a: No. We do not promise hit rates. A useful signal is one you can understand, size, and discard when invalid.
pages.signalsFaq2q: Who can access the full feed?
pages.signalsFaq2a: Registered clients can unlock the dashboard signal centre. Marketing pages show sample ideas for orientation.
pages.signalsFaq3a: You can act manually from the trading room or use AI strategies separately. Always confirm risk parameters before execution.
pages.signalsCtaTitle: Follow the desk with eyes open
pages.signalsCtaSub: Create an account to unlock the live feed, then trade only what fits your plan.
pages.privacyIntro: {{entity}} is committed to protecting your privacy. This policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your personal information.
pages.privacyCollectBody: We collect information you provide directly, including name, email, identity documents for KYC, and financial transaction data.
pages.privacyUseBody: Your information is used to provide services, comply with legal obligations, process transactions, and communicate with you.
pages.privacySecurityBody: We implement TLS 1.3 encryption, AES-256 at rest, and regular security audits.
pages.privacyRightsBody: Under GDPR, you have the right to access, correct, delete, or port your personal data.
pages.termsIntro: By using {{brandName}}, you agree to these Terms of Service.
pages.termsAccountBody: You must provide accurate information and complete KYC before accessing investment services.
pages.termsRisksBody: All investments carry risk, including potential loss of principal. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
pages.termsFeesBody: Applicable fees are disclosed in your plan details. We reserve the right to modify fees with 30 days notice.
pages.cookiesIntro: This policy explains how {{brandName}} uses cookies and similar technologies.
pages.cookiesWhatBody: Cookies are small text files that help us provide and improve our services.
pages.cookiesEssential: Essential: Required for authentication and security.
pages.cookiesAnalytics: Analytics: Help us understand site usage.
pages.payoutsNote: Client identities are partially anonymised. Payouts processed within 1-3 business days.

economy.title: World economy
economy.subtitle: Rankings, forecasts, and macro context — GDP, inflation, rates, and more in one place.
economy.trendsSub: Track growth leaders and key US indicators at a glance.
economy.ideasSub: Popular community-style charts and theses on the global economy.
economy.heatmapSub: Compare core metrics across major economies.
economy.newsTeaser: Stay on top of FX and macro headlines that move currencies and risk assets.
economy.trendsPageSubtitle: Inflation, employment, production, debt, growth, and key interest rates across the G20.

trends.inflationSub: Explore inflation rates of the top G20.
trends.debtSub: G20 ranked by government debt to GDP.
trends.gdpSub: Fastest growing GDPs in the G20.
trends.ratesSub: Key interest rates across the top G20.

inflationMap.sourceFallback: Showing cached snapshot — live World Bank data unavailable

hedgeFunds.details: Our hedge fund offerings provide access to professionally managed alternative strategies designed for consistent risk-adjusted returns.

errors.title: Something went wrong
errors.description: An unexpected error occurred. Our team has been notified. Please try again or return to the homepage.
errors.chunkLoad: A new version of the site is available. Please reload the page.

pwa.installDesc: Open faster from your home screen — works like a native app.
